column1: Jain Irrigation Systems Limited was established in 1986. The Co. manufactures Micro Irrigation Systems, PVC Pipes, HDPE Pipes, Plastic Sheets, Agro Processed Products, Renewable Energy Solutions, Tissue Culture Plants, and other agricultural inputs. The Co. introduced the Internet of Things (IoT) in the agri-sector and is leading efforts to create global solutions with precision agriculture. [1]
